jobs.name: ernest-daily-brief
jobs.prompt: Set ERNEST_CRON_JOB=ernest-daily-brief. Read Ernest/00-Watch/ cards from the last 24h and the live inbox, calendar, and HubSpot pipeline. Write a short morning brief to Ernest/00-Daily/. Surface only items needing the CEO today. Remind-only — do not draft email or CRM content. If nothing needs attention, reply [SILENT].

jobs.name: ernest-ambient-watch
jobs.prompt: Set ERNEST_CRON_JOB=ernest-ambient-watch. Run ernest-watch: read memory/standing-concerns.md, execute each enabled concern's watch-half (detect only). Write reminder cards to Ernest/00-Watch/ with one-tap draft triggers. NEVER draft email, messages, or CRM writes in this job. If all concerns are clean, reply [SILENT].

jobs.name: ernest-hubspot-hygiene
jobs.prompt: Set ERNEST_CRON_JOB=ernest-hubspot-hygiene. Run hubspot-hygiene per ernest.yaml hygiene_policy: scan HubSpot for junk symbols, trim, exact dedupe (auto-apply only if dry_run=false and approved=true; else preview). Propose translations, status, priority, fuzzy dedupe as a reviewable batch. Snapshot before any live write. If nothing to fix, reply [SILENT].

jobs.name: ernest-self-improve
jobs.prompt: Set ERNEST_CRON_JOB=ernest-self-improve. Review this week's sessions and corrections. Use the Hermes Dojo to rank weak skills, then propose at most one improvement (install a vetted skill, author one with skill-creator, or patch via self-evolution). Output a reviewable proposal with a rollback. Adopt nothing without CEO approval.
